P2: build-spec purified, registration moved to init! (done). P3 decision: kept as plain atom rather than folding into Framework [:registry :arc-fx] — static process-global FX template data with zero multiplayer cross-contamination risk, and ~40 *_fx_test.clj call init! without a with-fresh-framework fixture; migrating would force framework setup onto all of them for no safety benefit.

P3 decision: kept as delay. It exists specifically to defer past namespace-load order (build-quick-move-config reads the :imag-fusor slot schema, registered by a load-order-dependent sibling ns); eager-evaluating at ns load would recreate hazard #2 (AOT/load-time capture of not-yet-registered state). delay already correctly solves this — first real use is always post-init.
P3 decision: kept as delay, same rationale as imag_fusor/gui_reactive.clj's quick-move-config.

P5 decision: kept, reclassified S2->S1. Keyed by [tut-id lang misaka-id] and holds a pure deterministic render of static tutorial text — a memoization cache, not mutable per-session state (same category as arc_fx.clj's template-cache, P3). Reuse across world/session switches for the same player is correct, not a leak.
P5 decision: kept, same rationale as reactive_overlay.clj's mode-switch-key-down?* — raw per-tick input-edge debounce (Left Alt), ephemeral and self-correcting, zero gameplay/save impact.
